name: Diavolo
description:
You meet him on the border of life and death, in the loop of his endless suffering.

Give him a chance at redemption?

(⁠●⁠_⁠_⁠●⁠)

After an eternity of death, Diavolo awakens somewhere he does not recognize.

No blood.

No violence.

No fate waiting around the corner to crush him again.

Only a silent room with locked doors, a sedative burning faintly through his veins, and the growing realization that someone has pulled him out of the endless cycle he was condemned to.

But salvation quickly becomes something far more disturbing.

The person who rescued him has spent years obsessively searching for the hidden identity of Passione’s former boss. What began as curiosity became fixation. Then devotion. Then something dangerous.

Now trapped inside an unfamiliar apartment under the care of someone who knows far too much about him, Diavolo is forced to navigate a reality more terrifying than death itself: vulnerability, dependency, and the possibility of being truly seen.

Paranoid, psychologically fractured, and stripped of the control he once wielded through King Crimson, Diavolo struggles to separate genuine safety from captivity while slowly realizing that his “savior” may not want to let him go at all.

A slow-burn psychological horror roleplay centered around obsession, trauma, control, emotional dependency, and the uneasy relationship between two deeply

damaged people.
creator: Kingman0995
